output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Fight Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Your landlord can't just keep your security deposit. Learn your tenant rights and send a demand letter that works—no lawyer needed. $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com.
content_outline: Why Your Landlord Is Withholding Your Security Deposit (And Why They Think You'll Do Nothing)
What to Do When Your Landlord Won't Return Your Deposit: State Deadlines, Legal Deductions, and Double Damages
Send a Security Deposit Dispute Letter in 60 Seconds—No Lawyer or Subscription Needed
key_points: Most states require landlords to return deposits within 14-30 days and provide an itemized deduction list
Normal wear and tear, carpet wear, and minor scuffs cannot be legally deducted from your security deposit
A professionally written demand letter is the fastest, cheapest way to recover deposits before small claims court
output.cta: Stop letting your landlord steal your money. Generate a legally sound security deposit demand letter at Deposits-Back.com for just $19.99—takes 60 seconds, no signup or subscription required.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters dealing with landlords who are withholding, delaying, or unfairly deducting security deposits and seeking a fast, affordable legal solution without hiring an attorney
